# Prompt Paster LLM Index

Prompt Paster is a native macOS menu-bar utility for selecting reusable coding
agent prompts from an overlay and copying them to the clipboard.

## Core Tree

```text
Package.swift
Packaging/
  Info.plist
Sources/PromptPaster/
  App/
    AppDelegate.swift
    PromptPasterApp.swift
  Models/
    Prompt.swift
    PromptLibrary.swift
  Services/
    ClipboardService.swift
    PromptLibraryCoding.swift
    PromptSearch.swift
    PromptStore.swift
  Overlay/
    PromptOverlayActions.swift
    OverlayKeyCaptureView.swift
    OverlayWindowController.swift
    PromptOverlayState.swift
    PromptOverlayView.swift
  Resources/
    SeedPrompts.json
  Settings/
    SettingsView.swift
    SettingsWindowController.swift
Tests/PromptPasterTests/
  PromptLibraryTests.swift
  PromptOverlayStateTests.swift
  PromptSearchTests.swift
  PromptStoreTests.swift
docs/
  design-architecture-spec.md
  implementation-plan.md
  review-recommendations.md
scripts/
  build-app.sh
```

## Critical Entry Points

- App entrypoint: `Sources/PromptPaster/App/PromptPasterApp.swift`
- App delegate and menu actions: `Sources/PromptPaster/App/AppDelegate.swift`
- Overlay window management: `Sources/PromptPaster/Overlay/OverlayWindowController.swift`
- Overlay UI and keyboard selection state: `Sources/PromptPaster/Overlay/PromptOverlayView.swift`
- Pure overlay state helpers: `Sources/PromptPaster/Overlay/PromptOverlayState.swift`

## Data Model and Storage

- Prompt model: `Sources/PromptPaster/Models/Prompt.swift`
- Prompt library schema and validation: `Sources/PromptPaster/Models/PromptLibrary.swift`
- JSON encoder/decoder setup: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/PromptLibraryCoding.swift`
- Application Support prompt store: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/PromptStore.swift`
- Bundled seed data: `Sources/PromptPaster/Resources/SeedPrompts.json`

Default user library path:

```text
~/Library/Application Support/Prompt Paster/prompts.json
```

## Search and Overlay Behavior

- Search/category filtering: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/PromptSearch.swift`
- Keyboard event bridge: `Sources/PromptPaster/Overlay/OverlayKeyCaptureView.swift`
- Current overlay scope: browse, search, filter, navigate, copy selected prompts,
  close after successful copy, and keep the overlay open on clipboard failure.

## Configuration and Packaging

- SwiftPM configuration: `Package.swift`
- App bundle metadata: `Packaging/Info.plist`
- Local `.app` builder: `scripts/build-app.sh`
- Build output is ignored under `.build/` and `dist/`.

## Planning and Agent Context

- Static agent rules: `AGENTS.md`
- Dynamic agent state: `.agent-plan.md`
- Product/design spec: `docs/design-architecture-spec.md`
- Implementation roadmap: `docs/implementation-plan.md`
- Prior app-shell review rationale: `docs/review-recommendations.md`

## Standard Validation

```bash
swift build
swift test
scripts/build-app.sh
plutil -lint Packaging/Info.plist
```
